name: PsExec Process Observed
notes: This rule triggers when a PsExec process has been detected.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
when an event matches any of the following BB: PsExec Has Been Detected
when an event matches any of the following PsExec Has Been Launched From a Compromised Host
TD_list: APPLY PsExec Process Observed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
AND when an event matches any of the following BB: PsExec Has Been Detected
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following PsExec Has Been Launched From a Compromised Host
RED_list: Event name: PsExec Has Been Detected
Event description: PsExec Has Been Detected
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
